final.prompt:
Use case: homepage branding logo animation
Primary request: Create a short homepage brand loop from the reference image.
Scene/background: same ausos aurora gradient card from the input reference
Subject: the exact white ausos icon and wordmark from the reference
Action: only the soft cyan, mint, lavender, and peach aurora background slowly breathes; the logo remains locked and unchanged
Camera: locked-off, no zoom, no pan
Lighting/mood: soft luminous aurora glow, premium calm product-brand feel
Color palette: cyan, mint, lavender, peach, white
Timing/beats: 4 seconds, slow seamless loop
Constraints: keep the logo, wordmark, diacritic bars, spacing, icon shapes, color, placement, and rounded-card feel identical to the input reference
Avoid: no new text, no misspelled text, no logo morphing, no extra symbols, no camera shake, no flicker, no UI chrome
